channel.title: BrierStudios — Commits
channel.description: Auto-generated commit feed from the main branch.

item.title: feat(pages): schedule page with Calendly embed placeholder
item.description: New Feature — feat(pages): schedule page with Calendly embed placeholder

item.title: feat(head): RSS alternate link for auto-discovery
item.description: New Feature — feat(head): RSS alternate link for auto-discovery

item.title: test: performance budget enforcement (HTML 50KB / CSS 60KB / JS 50KB / TTFB 800ms)
item.description: Testing — test: performance budget enforcement (HTML 50KB / CSS 60KB / JS 50KB / TTFB 800ms)

item.title: test: e2e smoke tests (13 tests against production)
item.description: Testing — test: e2e smoke tests (13 tests against production)

item.title: test: unit tests (10 tests, node:test) + CI workflow on every PR
item.description: Testing — test: unit tests (10 tests, node:test) + CI workflow on every PR

item.title: feat(pages): project templates gallery (Othala, Tiwaz, Thurisaz, Fehu, Wunjo, Sowilo)

item.title: feat(i18n): dropdown switcher (EN/ES/PT) with localStorage persistence
item.description: New Feature — feat(i18n): dropdown switcher (EN/ES/PT) with localStorage persistence

item.title: feat(status): email subscription form for outage alerts
item.description: New Feature — feat(status): email subscription form for outage alerts

item.title: feat(404): interactive search + quick links to popular pages
item.description: New Feature — feat(404): interactive search + quick links to popular pages

item.title: feat(worker): outage alerts, GitHub webhook (HMAC+Discord), category RSS feeds
item.description: New Feature — feat(worker): outage alerts, GitHub webhook (HMAC+Discord), category RSS feeds

item.title: feat(analytics): privacy-respecting 1x1 pixel counter (no cookies, no IP)
item.description: New Feature — feat(analytics): privacy-respecting 1x1 pixel counter (no cookies, no IP)

item.title: feat(pages): component library showcase (buttons, cards, tags, forms)

item.title: feat(pages): FAQ with Schema.org/FAQPage JSON-LD (8 questions)
